symbolic_calibration.method: training-percentile thresholds plus probability thresholds calibrated from model false-negative patterns

symbolic_rule_summary.method: shallow decision-tree leaves over benign-predicted calibration rows

evidence_separation.live_evaluation: computed by nids_engine.py from model predictions and processed test data
evidence_separation.paper_summary: loaded from results/metrics.json only when explicitly requested
evidence_separation.publication_package: generated artifacts under results/publication_package and paper/generated

backend.note: Frontend data is served from Flask endpoints backed by model and CSV resources.

metric_comparison.source: live-window evaluation from model predictions and test labels
metric_comparison.note: All metrics, including ROC-AUC and PR-AUC, are computed by backend/nids_engine.py from current predictions.

statistical_validation.method: paired bootstrap over the selected live evaluation window

live_rows.source: current backend proposed model before symbolic fusion
current backend proposed model with symbolic fusion and uncertainty outputs

historical_common_ids_baselines.note: Historical common IDS baselines are reported as external comparison context; live charts use the current backend baseline and proposed model.

improvement_curve.note: Each trend point is recomputed from the selected backend window prefix, so flow index, seed, fusion, and window controls all change the figure evidence.

latency_comparison.source: effective operational latency derived from measured backend evaluation time, baseline error review burden, symbolic rule rate, and UNKNOWN shortcut rate

throughput_comparison.source: derived flows/s from measured mean response latency

unknown_attack_detection.source: labelled attack flows routed to UNKNOWN review by adaptive confidence, margin, and entropy gates

difference_chart.source: live neuro-symbolic metrics minus live baseline MLP metrics

attack_recall_gain.source: per-class recall from live classification reports

rule_trigger_counts.source: live rule trace counts for selected parameters

rule_trigger_analysis.source: triggered versus applied symbolic evidence from live traces

examples.explanation: Calibration tree leaf targets neural false negatives: 6/21 benign-predicted calibration flows in this region were DoS/DDoS.

rule_analytics.attack_recall_basis: attack-labelled flows detected by a final attack label or routed to UNKNOWN review

computation_log: Improvement curve recomputed from live baseline/neuro-symbolic predictions for windows [100, 188, 375, 562, 750].
Detection counts computed as distinct labelled attacks, baseline attack predictions, neuro-symbolic attack predictions, containment candidates, and high-confidence block recommendations.
Per-class F1 and error rates computed from live classification reports for the selected window.

ablation.metric_mode: exact multiclass live-window metrics; uncertainty stages report accepted high-confidence coverage

closed_set_exact.source: exact multiclass metrics over the full live window

notes: Legacy baseline is a shallow ExtraTrees edge model trained on the same processed training split.
Neural calibrated uses the compatible proposed model with temperature-scaled probabilities.
Symbolic fusion adds auditable rule traces before the confidence and margin gate.
The uncertainty layer reports selective high-confidence coverage plus explicit UNKNOWN review counts.
Conformal prediction sets provide an uncertainty-aware abstention signal.
OOD scoring uses standardized distance from a deterministic reference prefix.
These reliability outputs should be reported as validation evidence, not as a replacement for external testing.

rule_analytics.attack_recall_basis: attack-labelled flows detected by a final attack label or routed to UNKNOWN review

evidence_policy.live_evaluation: figures and tables are generated from backend recomputation on model predictions and test labels
evidence_policy.paper_summary: saved-paper-summary values are retained only under charts.paper_summary for traceability

needs_manual_review: Confirm baseline definitions against cited literature.
Add final bibliography with verified IEEE references.
Document train/test split and hyperparameters in manuscript.
